description.value: Allied Surgical Emporium is a highly-rated surgical supply store in Lucknow, providing essential medical equipment and solutions. They offer a comprehensive range of products including Cautery Machines, OT Lights, Portable Fumigation and Fogger Machines, SoClean Biomedical Waste Solutions, and Surgical Sutures, serving the critical needs of healthcare professionals with quality and reliability.

address.value: Allied Surgical Emporium, Opposite Daya Nidhan Park, Lalbagh, Lucknow, Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, 226001
